case_title: EDITH LUCANA VS. BLERDS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCANA, EDITH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLERDS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,297.82 FILED BY LUCANA, EDITH AS TO DEFENDANT BLERDS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCANA, EDITH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SARAH GUEST--PROP. MANAGER/ OWNER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARITZA ZURITA. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLERDS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
